steps.t: Pond lilies can be found in ponds throughout the Beorning-lands. You should collect pond lilies for Haldis.
Haldis wishes for you to decorate the inside of Grimbeorn's lodge. You should decorate the inside of the lodge with the lilies you collected.
Haldis can be found at the Beorninghús. You should inform Haldis that the decorations are complete.
